description: Default capability covering the Steno main window and the quicknote floating window. Allows core APIs (window show/hide/focus, app exit, IPC to custom Rust commands) and the start-dragging window IPC used by the quicknote header to move the borderless floating window. Plugin-side permissions for global-shortcut are not needed here because PR1/PR2 register shortcuts from Rust only; future PRs that expose registration to JS should add `global-shortcut:default`.
